name: Cherry or Peach Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Cherries or Peaches (fresh or canned)
If Using Cherries, Add: 1 teaspoon Almond Extract
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1. Combine 1 cup All-Purpose Flour, 1 tablespoon Granulated Sugar, 1 teaspoon Baking Powder, and 1/4 teaspoon Salt in a bowl.
2. Cut in 2 tablespoons Butter or Margarine until crumbly.
3. Stir in enough Milk (to taste) to moisten the mixture.
4. Drop by tablespoonfuls over the fruit mixture in an ungreased 8-inch square baking pan.
5. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (232 degrees C).
6. Bake for 10 to 13 minutes, or until golden brown.
If using cherries, stir in 1 teaspoon Almond Extract instead of Vanilla before pouring the fruit mixture into the pan. For best results, double the dough recipe and bake at 400 degrees F (204 degrees C) for 20 to 25 minutes.
